title: pilosella officinarum subsp. euronota
intro: Pilosella officinarum subsp. euronota, also known as a subspecies of the common plant known as Rough Hawk's-beard, is a perennial herb in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits associated with Pilosella officinarum subsp. euronota include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its ability to help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, and are often used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
